steps.title: Identify hours per course type from the coefficients
steps.content:
In the equation $10x + 15y = 85$, each coefficient represents the hours for that course type.

The coefficient 10 (paired with $x$, on-site courses) means each on-site course is 10 hours.

The coefficient 15 (paired with $y$, online courses) means each online course is 15 hours.

steps.title: Calculate the difference
steps.content: Subtract the on-site hours from the online hours: $$15 - 10 = 5$$ Each online training course takes 5 more hours than each on-site training course.
